scripts.dev: sh -c 'node scripts/docker-privileged-proxy.mjs & proxy=$!; trap "kill $proxy" EXIT INT TERM; socket="$PWD/.wrangler/docker-privileged.sock"; for i in $(seq 1 100); do [ -S "$socket" ] && break; sleep 0.1; done; [ -S "$socket" ] || { echo "Docker proxy socket not found at $socket."; exit 1; }; DOCKER_HOST="unix://$socket" wrangler dev --port 8787'
